Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Jul-18-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted.

RULING: The Court adopted the tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB'S Motion To Compel Arbitration is granted. No opposition filed. The Court signed the order that was submitted by email. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.
